info.title: Rootz Property Intelligence
info.description: AI-powered real estate farming and property intelligence for Florida. 10.8M parcels across all 67 counties, courthouse records (litigation pending, probate, liens), FEMA flood zones, schools, demographics, building permits, and owner intelligence — all with cryptographic provenance from government sources.

get.summary: Full Property Intelligence Package — Single address deep-dive
get.description: Full property intelligence for any FL address. Returns owner, value, farming score, court records, flood zone, schools, permits, demographics. Use /api/fl/farm for area searches.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: City name. Works for any FL city: Fort Lauderdale, Coral Springs, Hollywood, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, Jacksonville, etc.

origin.description: Provenance metadata including confidence score, document hash, and SSL certificates

property.description: Property details: address, owner, building specs, lot, classification

flood.description: FEMA flood zone, base flood elevation, insurance requirement

demographics.description: Census block group demographics: income, population, home values, owner-occupancy

schools.description: Nearest public, private, and charter schools with enrollment and capacity

buildingPermits.description: Building permit history with contractor names and work descriptions

get.description: Fast lookup from Miami-Dade County GIS. Returns property details for any of 936,739 properties.
Query FEMA flood zones by coordinates. Works nationwide.

200.description: Flood zone, base flood elevation, insurance requirement

get.description: Find public, private, and charter schools near any Miami-Dade coordinates.

200.description: Nearest schools with enrollment, capacity, and distance

get.description: Search 481,950 building permits by folio number or address.

200.description: Building permits with type, contractor, dates, and estimated value

get.description: Block-group level demographics for any US address.

200.description: Population, income, home values, owner-occupancy, median age

get.description: Search for a person or entity across all Massachusetts properties. Finds name variants and all document appearances.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Person or entity name to search

200.description: All properties and documents where this name appears

get.description: Automated fraud risk scoring for Massachusetts properties. Checks for orphan deeds, rapid transfers, financial distress, and more.

200.description: Risk level, flag count, specific warnings

get.summary: JOIN: Property Owner → FL Business Registry (LLC Unmasking)
get.description: Unmask LLC/Corp owners via FL Sunbiz. Returns officers, filing dates, succession signals. Provide owner name, address, or folio.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Entity name to look up (e.g., SEASIDE HOLDINGS LLC)

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Property street address — will extract owner from property record

200.description: Property owner resolved to business entity with officers, filing history, and succession signals

get.summary: JOIN: Property Owner → SEC Public Companies (Institutional Detection)
get.description: Cross-references a Florida property owner against SEC-registered public companies via origin.rootz.global. Identifies REITs, institutional investors, and public company subsidiaries that own Florida real estate. Provide an address, folio, or direct owner name.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Owner name to check (e.g., INVITATION HOMES)

200.description: Public company matches with ticker, sector, REIT detection

get.summary: Farming Prospect Search — Find motivated sellers by city and signal type
get.description: Find farming prospects in any FL city. Returns scored properties with court records, owner mailing addresses, equity, and bridge page URLs. Filter by signal type to match agent specialty.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: Florida city name (use + for spaces). Examples: FORT+LAUDERDALE, CORAL+SPRINGS, HOLLYWOOD, PEMBROKE+PINES, MIAMI, ORLANDO, TAMPA, JACKSONVILLE

parameters.name: signals
parameters.description: Comma-separated farming signals to filter by. Available: probate, lis_pendens (litigation pending/pre-foreclosure), lien, judgment (foreclosure), death, absentee, out_of_state, corporate, free_clear (mortgage paid off), no_homestead. Combine to match agent specialty: probate,death for estate specialists, absentee,out_of_state for investor property experts, lis_pendens,lien for distressed property agents.

parameters.name: minScore
parameters.description: Minimum farming score 0-100 (default 0). Use 40 for medium+ prospects, 70 for high-priority only.

200.description: Farming prospects with scores, reasons, owner mailing addresses, sale history, equity estimates, court records, property details, and bridge page URLs for each property

get.description: Property search for Ohio (Franklin, Hamilton, Cuyahoga counties — 1.2M parcels). Returns owner, value, sale history, and investor signals.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: City name (e.g., Columbus, Cincinnati, Cleveland, Hilliard)

get.summary: FULL OWNER INTELLIGENCE: Property + Private Registry + SEC Data
get.description: Full owner intelligence: resolves LLCs to officers via Sunbiz + detects public companies/REITs via SEC. Provide owner name, address, or folio.

200.description: Complete owner profile: entity type, officers, succession signals, institutional detection
